subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Some time ago that enamoured one of the Countenance of Truth, Aqa Ghulam-Rida, earnestly entreated that to the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی چندی پیش آشفته جمال حق آقا غلامرضا استدعا نمود که بان یاران
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation
